metadata.title: About Arteon – 10 Free Online Tools for Web, SEO & Design
metadata.description: Arteon is a creative agency building free browser-based tools: WebP converter, favicon generator, color contrast checker, QR code maker and more.

hero.title: Free online tools built by a creative agency
hero.description: 10 browser-based tools for images, SEO, colors, email signatures and QR codes — no registration, no file uploads, no limits

whoWeAre.title: Who we are
whoWeAre.p1: Arteon is a Polish creative agency. Beyond our commercial work, we build and maintain a growing collection of free online tools designed for business owners, website creators, designers, marketers, and anyone who works with digital content.
whoWeAre.p2: Every tool we create solves a specific, everyday problem: converting images, checking color contrast, generating favicons, creating QR codes, and more. Our goal is to build a comprehensive toolkit where you can find everything you need in one place — without switching between dozens of different websites.

items.title: No registration, no limits
items.description: Every tool works instantly in your browser. No account required, no login, no payment.

items.title: Privacy first
items.description: Your files never leave your device. All processing happens locally in your browser — we do not send your data to any server.

items.title: Built from real needs
items.description: Each tool was born from a real problem we encountered while working on client projects. If we needed it, chances are you do too.

items.title: Funded by ads, free for you
items.description: We use Google AdSense banners to cover the costs of development and hosting. Thanks to ad revenue, we can keep all tools free and continue building new ones.

items.title: Images & favicons
items.description: WebP converter, online image editor, and favicon generator. 3 tools for everyday image work.

items.title: Meta & SEO
items.description: Meta title and description checker plus a word and character counter to evaluate text length.

items.title: Email & communication
items.description: HTML email signature generator with ready code for Gmail and Outlook.

items.title: Colors & accessibility
items.description: WCAG contrast checker, image color extractor, and color palette generator. 3 tools for working with color.

items.title: Print & materials
items.description: QR code generator for websites, vCards, menus, and flyers. Export to PNG and SVG.

whatsNext.title: What's next
whatsNext.text: We are actively working on expanding the toolkit. New tools are added regularly based on user feedback and our own experience. The goal is a single platform where business owners, designers, and developers have access to every essential tool — all in one place, all for free.

privacy.title: Privacy and security
privacy.textBefore: We respect your privacy. Files you upload to our tools are processed exclusively in your browser and are never sent to any server. We use analytics (Google Analytics 4) and advertising (Google AdSense) only after you give consent via the cookie banner. Full details are available in our

cta.title: Try our tools
cta.description: 10 free online tools — no registration, no limits, no file uploads to servers
